candidates.why: Explicit top-line revenue figure for the company; only clear revenue/sales row in candidates.
Direct cost of materials and consumables used in production; best representation of cost of goods sold.
Personnel-related overhead expenses typical of SG&A; excludes COGS and D&A.
Broad operating overhead bucket likely including selling, general and administrative expenses when no explicit SG&A line is provided.
Mixed operating income/expense line; may include non-core items, so less ideal than salaries/operating expenses for SG&A.

candidates.row_label: Other operating cash flow incl currency exchange
candidates.why: Cash flow line, not an income statement expense classification; should not be used as SG&A component.

variables.notes: Excluded cash flow and mixed other operating income/expenses line from SG&A components to avoid non-overhead and non-P&L classification items.
No R&D-specific row provided among candidates; treat as zero for PROF purposes.

candidates.why: Primary income statement line for interest expense; best match for gross interest cost.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Component of total interest related to lease liabilities; more granular than needed when a total Interest Expense line exists.
Represents profit attribution, not interest; should not be used for interest expense.
Represents profit or comprehensive income attributable to minority interests, not interest expense.
Profit attribution to controlling shareholders; unrelated to interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Profit to controlling interests excl extritems
candidates.why: Adjusted profit attribution; not an interest cost.
Duplicate/variant of profit to controlling interests; not interest expense.
Comprehensive income attribution; not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental detail for lease interest, but less appropriate than the main Interest Expense line for overall interest cost.
Cash flow representation of interest; PROF typically prefers P&L expense when available.
Interest income, opposite sign of interest expense.
Financing cash flow related to equity transactions; not interest.
Cash interest paid; overlaps with P&L interest expense but on cash basis.
Dividends to minority equity holders; not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Acquisition of interest in a subsidiary from non-controlling interests
candidates.why: Equity transaction with NCI; not interest.
Income from associates; not a balance sheet equity figure.

candidates.row_label: Proft to equity holder of parent from discontinuing operations
candidates.why: Profit attribution, not total book equity.

candidates.row_label: Proceeds from sale of fixed assets/equity inestments
candidates.why: Cash inflow from asset/equity sales; not book equity.

candidates.row_label: Proceeds from sale of shares and other equity instruments
candidates.why: Cash flow from disposals; not total shareholders' equity.

candidates.row_label: Purchase of shares and equity investments
candidates.why: Investment cash flow; not equity balance.

variables.notes: No candidate corresponds to total book/shareholders' equity; BE set to zero for PROF purposes.

candidates.why: Represents profit attributable to non-controlling interests; reflects the presence of minority interests though it is a flow, not the equity balance.
Label for non-controlling interests in income/comprehensive income; closest available proxy for minority interest given candidates.
Attribution to controlling shareholders, not minority interest.

candidates.row_label: Profit to controlling interests excl extritems
candidates.why: Adjusted profit to controlling shareholders; not minority interest.
Comprehensive income attributable to majority shareholders; not minority interest.
Cash flow for purchasing minority interests; transaction, not the minority interest balance.
Dividends paid to minority holders; again a flow, not the balance.

candidates.row_label: Acquisition of interest in a subsidiary from non-controlling interests
candidates.why: Equity transaction with NCI; not the standing minority interest balance.

variables.notes: Using the income statement 'Minority interests' line as a proxy for MIB since no explicit balance sheet minority equity line is available among candidates; should be reviewed by a human for consistency with PROF’s intended MIB definition.
